docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC.

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER LILLY ALEMAYEHU REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, CHUANGREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
